# Test fixtures

Vendored from `kipcole9/image` (the `Image` library), `test/support/images/`.

| Local name | Source name | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `portrait.jpg` | `Kip_small.jpg` | Small JPEG with EXIF ‚Äî exercises `metadata=` policy. |
| `portrait.png` | `Kip_small.png` | Same content as PNG ‚Äî format negotiation. |
| `portrait_rotated.jpg` | `Kip_small_rotated.jpg` | EXIF rotation tag ‚Äî auto-rotate behaviour. |
| `alpha.png` | `penguin_with_alpha.png` | Transparency ‚Äî `background=` flatten. |
| `tiny.png` | `2x2-maze.png` | Smallest possible PNG ‚Äî bounds. |
| `landscape.jpg` | `Sydney-Opera-House-BW.jpg` | Wide aspect ‚Äî fit modes. |
| `sample.webp` | `puppy.webp` | Source-format coverage. |
| `animated.webp` | `animated.webp` | Multi-frame ‚Äî `anim=` option. |
| `large.png` | `jose.png` | Larger PNG for resize-down assertions. |

The `sample.jpg`, `sample.png`, and `watermark.png` files are programmatically generated by the M2 / M5 milestones (solid-colour fixtures via `Image.new/3`) and are not vendored.

To re-vendor (when fixtures change upstream): run `test/fixtures/vendor_images.sh`.

These fixtures are derivative of files in the [`kipcole9/image`](https://github.com/kipcole9/image) repository. They are vendored here under the same terms as the upstream project. See that project's LICENSE for redistribution terms; if you intend to redistribute this package, confirm the licensing.
